label: 106_emmanuel tumusiimemutebile_tumusiimemutebile_caleb fundanga_fundanga
description: Dr Caleb Fundanga served as Governor of the Bank of Zambia, focusing on economic opportunities and financial market development. He also fostered cooperation between the central bank and academic institutions to support professional growth.
